五一假期已经结束，但打工人的“节后综合症”并未消退。

面对永远99+的工作群消息，和改不完的PPT，打工人蝈蝈在摸鱼时打开灵光APP里的一个小游戏——“老板被我fire了”。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资，翊荣资本担任长期独家财务顾问。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电气系

chinese_news.title: 获高秉强、蓝驰领投数千万融资，浙大00后创业者从远景观测切入AI智能影像｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，星识（宁波）科技有限公司（以下简称“星识科技”）近日连续完成天使+轮和天使++轮融资，累计金额达数千万元。两轮融资分别由高秉强教授旗下高锋耐心资本和蓝驰创投领投、松禾资本跟投，老股东清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛持续加注。本轮资金将主要用于智能影像核心技术研发、新品矩阵打造和产品体验的迭代优化，以及生产体系与供应链能力建设。此前，公司已获得李泽湘教授旗下宁波智能技术研究院、清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛的种子轮及天使轮投资。

星识科技是一家专注智能影像技术研发与硬件制造的企业，以远景观测场景为切点，曾推出融合AI功能的Vizta智能望远镜，已在Kickstarter和Indiegogo众筹达数百万元。

望远镜作为长期被传统光学巨头主导的市场，正在被新生代创业者以消费级的智能化产品重新撬动。星识科技巧妙地通过结构设计与AI算法创新，将手机变为智能望远镜，不仅低成本、高效地实现了远景观测和拍摄的一体性，还通过AI功能进一步降低了产品操作门槛、丰富了产品玩法和趣味性。这种软硬件融合的创新解决

chinese_news.title: 「维新宇航」完成数千万元天使+轮融资，7座3吨级eVTOL将于7月进行首飞测试｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，低空出行产品研制商「维新宇航」已完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮融资由策源资本领投、金舵投资跟投，资金将主要用于加速公司首款主力机型 Vector 5的���发迭代、首飞测试与适航取证进程。

维新宇航成立于2023年，是36氪长期关注的企业，其专注于大载客量、大载重eVTOL/eCTOL产品的研发及制造。加上6个月前连续完成的种子轮、天使轮，目前维新宇航已完成三轮融资，累计资金交割总额超亿元人民币。

现阶段，维新��航的主力机型Vector 5为一款7座3吨级纯电复合翼eVTOL，该机型专注于应急救援和医疗急救等民生刚需场景，最大起飞重量为3180kg、最大载荷为680kg，最大航程300km、最高巡航速度为 250km/h，全尺寸样机已于去年6月正式下线。

chinese_news.title: 卡位黄金价格带，问界M6向下争夺年轻群体｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年的中国新能源SUV市场正经历着前所未有的内卷。

问界依托华为技术体系，推出了定位更亲民的全新车型 M6， 瞄准主流家用消费群体。放在问界品牌整体销量连续数月下滑、赛力斯盈利能力承压的背景下，M6的到来既是“救兵”，更是一场不容有失的“大考”。

卡位黄金价格带，向下争夺年轻群体

从产品命名逻辑看，M6位于M5与M7之间，车身尺寸为4960×1985×1736mm，轴距2950mm，属于标准的中大型五座SUV。官方定位为“新锐智慧SUV”，目标用户从问界以往的主力“30岁以上家庭用户和商务人群”向下延伸至25-35岁城市年轻群体。

25-30万元是目前中国新能源SUV市场竞争最激烈的价格带——特斯拉Model Y、理想L6、小鹏G6、比亚迪唐等车型均在此区间鏖战。作为参考，理想L6起售价24.98万元，小鹏G6起售价20.99万元，Model Y后驱版26.35万元。问界M6以25.98万元起售，锚定的正是理想L6的核心区间，试图以更低门槛的增程方案和更激进的全系标配策略争夺年轻家庭用户。

chinese_news.title: 小红书四年AI 路：FOMO、犹豫，到突然加速
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 肖思佳

编辑 | 乔芊 杨轩

所有互联网大中厂都渴望在AI时代博得位置，在这场比赛中，小红书曾是克制的那个。

在一个搜索属性与社区属性并存，以真实经验分享为核心的产品中，活人感与AI、温情和算法，始终像天平的两端。

很长一段时间里，小红书既没有完全缺席技术探索，也没有像许多同行那样高调推进AI产品化。相反，这家公司始终在两股力量的拉锯和平衡中前行：一边持续投入模型能力，一边谨慎控制AI对社区生态的介入。

但2026年，随着Agent叙事的升温，小红书开始显露出某种急迫。

4月30日，小红书发送全员内部信，宣布成立AI一级部门Dots，“建立从模型研发、基础设施、工程到产品的完整技术体系，整合顶尖AI人才和资源。”Dots向小红书新任总裁柯南汇报。

据36氪了解，Dots部门由原人文智能实验室Hi Lab升级而来，下设模型研发、基础设施、工程、产品四个部门。目前小红书内部最重要的AI应用产品“点点”也被纳入该

chinese_news.title: 第一代全固态电池迈入规模化市场，「纯锂新能源」完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 张冰冰

编辑 | 阿至

36氪获悉，北京纯锂新能源科技有限公司（以下简称「纯锂新能源」）近日宣布完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资，投资方为亦庄国投，云道资本担任独家财务顾问，资金将用于产品研发、市场拓展及产线落地。

「纯锂新能源」成立于2022年5月，聚焦全固态电池研发，通过自研复合电解质及超临界包覆工艺，破解全固态电池核心固固接触难题。2023年4月在北京亦庄建成小试线，量产10Ah全固态电芯；2023年5月在河南兰考县国电投新能源产业园启动建设500MWh规模量产线；2024年10月实现50Ah全固态电芯量产。

「纯锂新能源」于2025年推出第一代固态电池，全固态产品平均失重率0.023%，产品通过第三方国家标准实验室安全认证（CNAS）GB/T36276-2018 检测，目前正优先推进储能场景落地，并在低速动力等方向开展验证，为后续进入更广泛动力电池市场积累工程与商业化基础。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut interest rates before 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Friday jobs report beat expectations but showed red flags; Fed signals rates staying higher for longer, creating high-volatility pricing on rate-cut timing.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates' + nonfarm payrolls beat 55K consensus; Michael Burry 1999-2000 bubble comparison raises recession hedging demand.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA's stock close above $150 on 2026-08-01?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Intel, AMD, and Micron surged double digits this week on CPU/memory narrative; NVIDIA lagging signals investor rotation out of AI leader into chip ecosystem diversification.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Wall Street sees changing of the guard in AI' + 'Intel shares soar on Apple chip deal report' signals chipmaking pivot away from GPU concentration.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC holding above $80K but ETF outflows hit $268M; crypto regulatory tailwinds (CLARITY Act markup May 14, SEC Atkins signaling new onchain rules) compete with macro headwinds (rate-cut uncertainty).
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin stalls as BTC ETF outflows hit $268M' + 'US CLARITY Act sees big step forward' markup May 14; Cointelegraph: 'Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens'.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the U.S. unemployment rate exceed 5.0% by 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Jobs report beat expectations but Burry warns of bubble-like conditions; persistent inflation concerns and rate-hold signals suggest weakening labor demand ahead.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC jobs analysis: 'report had several red flags for the economy' despite payroll beat; Burry: 'Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment… feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble.'

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SEC Chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets and AI-driven finance; altcoins surging alongside Bitcoin suggests ETH derivative/DeFi sentiment may outpace macro headwinds.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'SEC chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets, AI-driven finance' + 'Coinbase rebounds as altcoins surge with bitcoin holding above $80,000.'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Intel's stock outperform Nvidia by at least 10 percentage points between 2026-05-05 and 2026-08-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg terminal closing prices for INTC vs NVDA; calculate cumulative return differential.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Narrative momentum (Apple chip deal, CPU/memory rotation) is recent and extrapolation risk is high; market may revert to NVIDIA dominance on AI inference scaling by Q3 2026.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Intel shares soaring on Apple deal + AMD double-digit surge creates herd rotation, but execution risk on new node economics remains

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the CLARITY Act pass the Senate Banking Committee markup and advance to floor vote by 2026-06-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Senate Banking Committee official schedule and voting records; U.S. Senate bills tracker (Congress.gov).
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Crypto industry is pricing near-certain passage, but bipartisan agreement on AML/CFT definitions has historically stalled; may not advance to floor before recess.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'US CLARITY Act sees big step forward as markup set for May 14' + CoinDesk: 'Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens' signals last-minute amendments risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX announce an IPO date or file S-1 by 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR filings (S-1 registration); official SpaceX or Musk X/press statements.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Rocket Lab IPO enthusiasm and space stock momentum are live, but SpaceX capital requirements and Musk's control preferences reduce near-term filing probability.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Enthusiasm for space stocks has skyrocketed ahead of SpaceX's anticipated IPO' + Rocket Lab 34% surge on revenue beat creates FOMO, but SpaceX timeline remains opaque.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Kraken parent company receive OCC federal charter approval by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: OCC press releases or Federal Register; Kraken parent company official announcements.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: OCC charter is historically hostile to crypto, but application signals regulatory pivot; approval unlikely within 8 months given typical review timelines and political scrutiny.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk and Cointelegraph: 'Kraken parent goes for the OCC charter' signals strategic shift, but no other major exchange has succeeded; policy uncertainty around Trump administration crypto stance.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Inspire Brands' IPO price exceed $25B valuation by first-day close on 2026-11-30 or later?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC S-1 filing (when released), first-day closing market cap calculation via Bloomberg or public stock data.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Six major QSR brands (Dunkin', Arby's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Baskin Robbins, Sonic, Jimmy John's) offer scale, but restaurant sector margin compression and labor cost inflation create valuation ceiling.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Dunkin' owner Inspire Brands confidentially files for IPO' but no price guidance; comparable quick-service IPOs (Restaurant Brands, Chipotle) trade 8-12x EBITDA; inflationary labor market headwind.

investment_theses.thesis: CPU and memory chip stocks (Intel, AMD, Micron) will outperform GPU/AI accelerator plays over the next 6 months as enterprise shift focus from inference scaling to edge inference and cost optimization.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Wall Street sees changing of the guard in AI' as Intel, AMD, Micron surged double digits while NVIDIA lags
CNBC: 'Intel shares soar on Apple chip deal report… only three companies capable of manufacturing most advanced chips'
Apple chip deal signals demand shift away from GPU-centric architectures toward CPU/SoC optimization
investment_theses.counter_view: NVIDIA maintains margin leadership and AI training demand (still 80%+ of AI capex); edge inference is a smaller market; Apple deal may be one-off.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH (Semiconductor ETF) or equal-weight long Intel (INTC) + AMD (AMD) + Micron (MU) vs. short NVDA; or long MU/AMD calls expiring 2026-11-30

investment_theses.thesis: BTC will consolidate below $85K through Q2 2026 as Fed rate-hold signal and ETF outflows ($268M) clash with regulatory tailwinds (CLARITY Act, SEC onchain rules), creating contrarian buy-the-dip opportunity into late June before summer rally.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin stalls as BTC ETF outflows hit $268M'; Bitcoin above $80K but momentum broken
CNBC: Fed 'quickly running out of reasons to cut rates' + April jobs beat signals no near-term rate cuts
CoinDesk: 'CLARITY Act sees big step forward as markup set for May 14' + 'SEC chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets'
investment_theses.counter_view: Macro deterioration (Burry bubble comparison, potential recession) could drive BTC below $70K; regulatory wins may already be priced in.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot via Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust (BTC) or MicroStrategy (MSTR) call spreads (buy $85 call, sell $100 call, expires 2026-08-15); or short-term long BTC/USD perps on Bybit with 3x leverage into May 14 CLARITY markup

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto regulatory narrative (CLARITY Act, SEC Atkins onchain rules, Kraken OCC charter push) will drive altcoin seasonality, favoring Ethereum and layer-2 tokens (Sui, Arbitrum proxies) through Q2 2026 as institutional clarity increases.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Coinbase rebounds as altcoins surge with bitcoin holding above $80K'
CoinDesk: 'SEC chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets, AI-driven finance'
Trending tokens: Sui (SUI), Ondo (ONDO) reflect institutional appetite for tokenized real-world assets and onchain frameworks
CoinDesk: 'Judge clears path for Aave to move $71M in ETH' signals legal pathway clarity boosting DeFi sentiment
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory rules may include restrictions on 'risky tokens'; Ethereum remains dependent on macro sentiment; layer-2 narratives fade if base layer scaling improves.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via spot pairs or options; or long SUI or layer-2 proxies (Arbitrum if listed) with 6-month time horizon; or Ethereum call spreads (buy $3,500, sell $4,500, expires 2026-08-30)

investment_theses.thesis: Michael Burry's 1999-2000 bubble warning combined with Fed rate-hold signals suggests equities face correction risk; defensible sectors (utilities, dividend-yielding large-cap tech) will outperform while high-multiple AI stocks (NVDA, broadmarket semis) face drawdown.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Michael Burry 'Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment… Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
CNBC: 'Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates' — rate holds lock in real rates higher for longer
Jobs report beat but 'had several red flags for the economy' — divergence between headline and internals signals hidden weakness
BTC ETF outflows + NVIDIA underperformance relative to chip peers suggests institutional risk-off positioning
investment_theses.counter_view: Earnings remain resilient; AI productivity gains justify valuations; Fed may still cut if recession arrives; market multiple compression already partially priced in.
investment_theses.expression: Short QQQ or NVDA via 6-month put spreads; or long DXY (US Dollar Index) + short equities hedge; or overweight SPY defensive sectors (XLY dividend leaders) vs. growth; or short high-beta tech via TECL inverse ETF

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese EV and aerospace startups (36Kr reports: Weixing Aviation eVTOL, Chunli Energy solid-state battery, autonomous systems) are accelerating fundraises ahead of potential Trump tariff regime; venture returns will compress if U.S.-China trade war intensifies by 2026 Q4.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr (Chinese source, not yet in English media): 'Weixing Aerospace completed tens of millions angel+ round; 7-seat 3-ton eVTOL first flight July 2026'; 'Chunli New Energy solid-state battery entering commercial scale, pre-A+ round completed'
CNBC: 'Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths' — suggests tariff negotiations still fluid but geopolitical risk rising
36Kr: 'Huawei-backed Wenjie M6 EV undergoing aggressive downmarket repositioning' signals Chinese automotive sector consolidation pressure
36Kr: 'DeepSeek fundraising up to 50 billion yuan' signals China AI capital concentration despite U.S. export controls
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese startups have historically navigated tariffs; aerospace/eVTOL timelines are long; venture returns dependent on exit liquidity, not tariff policy alone.
investment_theses.expression: Short Chinese EV/aerospace venture exposure via short positions in Chinese ADRs (NIO, XPeng, Li Auto); or reduce allocation to U.S. VC funds with heavy China exposure; or long DXY as tariff hedge against Yuan devaluation; or long gold as geopolitical risk hedge
